fields.name: name
fields.description: A user-defined identifier for the session.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the session's purpose or content.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current operational state of the session.

fields.name: parentId
fields.description: Reference to the parent entity's identifier.

fields.name: label
fields.description: A user-friendly identifier for the session.
